title: Custom column

posts.author: ram_perel (Ram Perel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,
We would like to have an application feature that allows you to control the popup window when clicking on a column and the value that displays on the column.
Like an iframe for the column area and the popup like that -

Thanks!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for the request @ram_perel !

Everyone: you can vote at the top of this screen!
